name: Rea Roofing
tagline: Licensed, bonded Santa Rosa roofing — residential and commercial
seoDescription: Rea Roofing is a licensed, bonded, and BBB-accredited Santa Rosa roofing contractor — shingle, metal, tile, and flat/TPO roofs, gutters, and repairs for homes and businesses across Sonoma County.

contact.address: 998 San Clemente Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa · Licensed C-39 Roofing Contractor
sections.heading: A roof that holds up to Sonoma County weather
sections.subheading: Rea Roofing installs and repairs residential and commercial roofs across Santa Rosa — shingle, metal, tile, and flat/TPO systems, plus gutters. Licensed, bonded, and BBB-accredited.

sections.heading: Credentialed work, start to finish
sections.intro: Roofing is one of the largest investments a building owner makes. Rea Roofing approaches every job with the licensing, coverage, and craftsmanship that protects it.

items.title: Licensed & bonded
items.body: Holds an active California C-39 roofing license (#1133025) and a $25,000 contractor's bond — standing you can confirm with the state before you hire.

items.title: Residential & commercial
items.body: From a single-family reroof to a commercial flat roof, the same crew handles homes and businesses across Sonoma County.

items.title: Built to last in the local climate
items.body: Systems chosen for Sonoma County's wet winters and dry, fire-season summers — installed to manufacturer spec, not shortcuts.

sections.heading: Complete roofing for homes and businesses

items.title: Shingle Roofing
items.description: Asphalt and composition shingle roofs — the most common residential system, installed for durability and curb appeal.

items.title: Metal Roofing
items.description: Long-life metal roofing for homes and commercial buildings, built for weather resistance and low maintenance.

items.title: Tile Roofing
items.description: Concrete and clay tile roofs that suit Sonoma County architecture and stand up to decades of sun.

items.title: Flat & TPO Roofing
items.description: Single-ply TPO and flat-roof systems for commercial buildings, additions, and low-slope sections.

items.title: Gutters
items.description: Gutter installation and replacement to move water off the roof and away from the structure.

items.title: Roof Repairs
items.description: Leak diagnosis, storm damage, and targeted repairs to extend the life of an existing roof.

sections.heading: A contractor you can check before you hire
sections.body: Anyone can call themselves a roofer. Rea Roofing's standing is a matter of public record — verify it before the first nail goes in.
points: Active CA C-39 license #1133025 (verify at cslb.ca.gov)

sections.heading: Need a roof estimate in Santa Rosa?
sections.body: Tell us about your home or building and we'll come take a look. No-obligation estimates across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County.

sections.heading: Every part of the roof, one contractor
sections.subheading: New roofs, replacements, repairs, and gutters for residential and commercial properties across Sonoma County.

items.title: Shingle Roofs
items.description: Asphalt and composition shingle installation and replacement — the workhorse residential roof, done to spec.

items.title: Tile Roofs
items.description: Concrete and clay tile that matches Sonoma County's homes and lasts for decades under the sun.

items.title: Metal Roofs
items.description: Standing-seam and metal panel roofing for homeowners who want a long-life, low-maintenance system.

items.title: Gutters
items.description: New and replacement gutters that protect the roofline, siding, and foundation from water.

items.title: TPO & Flat Roofing
items.description: Single-ply TPO and flat-roof systems for commercial buildings, low-slope sections, and additions.

items.title: Commercial Metal Roofing
items.description: Durable metal roofing for warehouses, shops, and commercial structures.

items.title: Repairs & Maintenance
items.description: Leak repair and roof maintenance to keep a commercial roof watertight and extend its service life.

sections.heading: From first call to finished roof
sections.intro: A straightforward process so you always know what comes next.

items.title: Free estimate
items.body: Call or send a message and we'll inspect the roof, talk through your options, and give you a clear, written estimate.

items.title: Plan the system
items.body: We help you choose the right material — shingle, tile, metal, or flat/TPO — for the building, the budget, and the local climate.

items.title: Install to spec
items.body: A licensed, bonded crew does the work to manufacturer specification, keeping the site clean and the timeline on track.

items.title: Final walkthrough
items.body: We walk the finished roof with you, clean up the property, and make sure you're satisfied before we call it done.

sections.heading: Not sure what your roof needs?
sections.body: Whether it's a full replacement or a single stubborn leak, we'll take a look and tell you straight.

sections.heading: A Santa Rosa roofing contractor doing it by the book
sections.subheading: Licensed, bonded, and BBB-accredited — roofing for Sonoma County homes and businesses.

sections.heading: Credentials first, then the craft
body: Rea Roofing, Inc. is an owner-led, Santa Rosa-based roofing contractor serving homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County. The company carries an active California C-39 roofing license and a $25,000 contractor's bond — the foundation that protects a customer's home and the people on the roof.

The work covers the full range of roofing systems: shingle, tile, and metal for residential properties, and flat and TPO systems for commercial buildings, along with gutters and repairs. Whether it's a single-family reroof or a commercial flat roof, the goal is the same — a watertight, code-built roof installed to manufacturer specification.

sections.heading: Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County
sections.body: Based on San Clemente Dr in Santa Rosa, Rea Roofing works throughout the county — and stands behind its standing with credentials any customer can verify.

sections.heading: Request a free roofing estimate
sections.blurb: Call (707) 332-0081 or stop by 998 San Clemente Dr, Santa Rosa, CA 95404. Rea Roofing serves homes and businesses across Sonoma County — estimates are free and there's no obligation.

sections.heading: Verify our license and standing
sections.body: We're licensed, bonded, and BBB-accredited — and we encourage you to confirm it for yourself.
points: CA C-39 license #1133025 — verify at cslb.ca.gov
